sections.heading:
A responsive grid allows a layout to adapt different screen sizes and ensures that the design is displayed consistently on all devices.
Press ‘shift’ + G to toggle Figma’s layout grid visibility
Interaction (Tooltip & max width)
content: Hovering over tags brings up a tooltip with the full tag content.
Tags truncate automatically when they exceed the maximum width.

sections.heading: Layout
content: Tags are laid out horizontally to fill containers. Make sure there is at least 4px between tags.
Tags will reflow onto the next line when container size is limited.

sections.heading: 8-pixel grid
content: The 8-pixel grid can be used for overall page layouts to define page sections and component placements.

sections.heading: Columns, gutters, and margins
content:
Columns: Guides what the content aligns to
Gutters: Fixed spacing between columns
Margins: Negative space beyond the content area

sections.heading: Setting
content: Target XL and until S. XS is not considered at this moment.
